query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "planbench-xl: evaluating long-horizon planning of llm tool-use agents " computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on security vulnerabilities (adversarial attacks and safety) in LLM agents, whereas the user's question concerns the evaluation of long-horizon planning capabilities and benchmarks. While both involve LLM agents, the paper does not measure the same planning mechanisms, planning-specific variables, or provide a baseline for planning performance, failing to meet the inclusion criteria for a literature review on planning evaluation.
